---
title: "BMvisualizing"
format: html
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
---
###Loading libraries
```{r Loading Libraries}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(patchwork)
library(Matrix)
library(ggplot2)
library(hdf5r)
library(SeuratData)
library(ggrepel)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

###Loading objects
```{r Loading Objects}
#Setting working directory
setwd("~/Forskning/Neuroblastoma Met/BM Publication/")

#Loading objects
UnintegratedMerged <-readRDS("Från Gustav/Doublet-Removed Merged BM Object.rds")
IntegratedObject <- readRDS("Från Gustav/Integrated Seurat Object.rds")
MetaData <- readRDS("Från Gustav/Seurat Object Metadata.rds")

#Loading DE results
MastResult <- readRDS("Från Gustav/MAST Random Intercept Result.rds")
EdgeRResult <- readRDS("Från Gustav/Edge R Result.rds")
```

```{r Setting colors}
# Set PDX colours
  PDX_colours <- setNames(c("#295692","#d09e53","#529fa6"), nm = sprintf("PDX%d",1:3))
  PDX_colours_light <- setNames(colorspace::lighten(PDX_colours,amount = 0.3), nm = sprintf("PDX%d",1:3))
  PDX_colours_dark <- setNames(colorspace::darken(PDX_colours,amount = 0.3), nm = sprintf("PDX%d",1:3))
# View colours
  all_colours <- c(PDX_colours_light,PDX_colours,PDX_colours_dark)
  all_colours <- all_colours[order(names(all_colours))]
  colorspace::demoplot(all_colours,type = "bar")
  
  # Import table
  dataset_information <- read_excel("~/Forskning/Neuroblastoma Met/T10/Raw Files/Deducing Dataset Names.xlsx")
# Make certain columns factor
  dataset_information <- dataset_information %>%
    mutate_at(vars(`Include in Analysis`, Folder, `Raw Matrix`, Original, `Presumed Cell Line`, `Mouse #`, Series, `Presumed Tissue`),
              as.factor) %>%
    arrange(Folder,`Current Folder Name`)
# Filter the dataset
  included_dataset_information <- dataset_information %>% 
    filter(`Include in Analysis` == "Yes")
  
  sample_indices <- 1:15
  
  # Create metadata table
  metadata_to_add <- included_dataset_information[sample_indices,] %>% 
    select(`Seurat Object Name`,Folder,`Year Sequenced`,`Presumed Run`,`Current Folder Name`,Series,`Presumed Cell Line`,
           `Presumed Tissue`,`Mouse #`) %>% 
    mutate(`Seurat Object Name` = gsub("_Counts$", "", `Seurat Object Name`)) %>%
    dplyr::rename(Cell_Line = `Presumed Cell Line`,
                  Mouse_n = `Mouse #`,
                  Tissue = `Presumed Tissue`) %>%
    mutate(Cell_Line_n = case_when(
      Cell_Line == "PALLAD" ~ "PDX1",
      Cell_Line == "FORPA" ~ "PDX2",
      Cell_Line == "LUNOV" ~ "PDX3",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )) %>% 
    mutate(Mouse_n = paste0(Series,"-",Cell_Line_n,"-",Mouse_n)) %>% 
    mutate(Cell_Line_n = factor(x = Cell_Line_n,levels = c("PDX1", "PDX2", "PDX3")),
           Tissue = relevel(Tissue, ref = "PT") ) %>% 
    relocate(Cell_Line_n, .after = Cell_Line)
# Generate sorted mouse ID string
  mouse_ID_sorted <- unique(metadata_to_add %>% arrange(Cell_Line_n,Series,Mouse_n) %>% pull(Mouse_n) )
# Make mouse ID factors
  metadata_to_add <- metadata_to_add %>% mutate(Mouse_n = factor(x = Mouse_n, levels = mouse_ID_sorted))
  
# Create a vector to track how many times each PDX line appears
  colour_use_count <- table(metadata_to_add$Cell_Line_n)
# Generate the color palette vector using sapply
  PDX_dataset_colours <- unlist(sapply(names(colour_use_count), function(i) {
    if (colour_use_count[i] > 1) {
      colorRampPalette(c(PDX_colours_dark[i], PDX_colours[i], PDX_colours_light[i]))(colour_use_count[i])
    } else {
      NULL
    }
  }))
  names(PDX_dataset_colours) <- metadata_to_add$`Seurat Object Name`[order(metadata_to_add$Cell_Line_n)]
# View the palette
  pie_colours <- function(colours) pie(rep(1, length(colours)), col = colours, labels = names(colours))
  pie_colours(PDX_dataset_colours)

  Tissue_colours <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(2), nm = rev(levels(IntegratedObject@meta.data$Tissue) ) )

#Cluster colors, MetBrewer - Signac
Cluster_colours <- c("1" = "#F4C40FFF", "2" = "#FE9B00FF", "3" = "#D8443CFF", "4" = "#9B3441FF", "5" = "#DE597CFF", "6" = "#E87B89FF","7" = "#E6A2A6FF", "8" = "#AA7AA1FF", "9" = "#9F5691FF", "10" = "#633372FF", "11" = "#1F6E9CFF", "12" = "#2B9B81FF", "13" = "#92C051FF")
```

###Visualizing Data
```{r Volcplot MAST}
#Data frame with gene name, log2-fold change and adjusted p-value for MAST results, with significance if in MastUp or MastDown
MastDF <- data.frame(Gene = MastResult$primerid, Log2FC = MastResult$MeanLog, AdjPValue = MastResult$BH_adj_p_val, Significant = ifelse(MastResult$BH_adj_p_val < 0.01 & MastResult$MeanLog > 1, "Upregulated", ifelse(MastResult$BH_adj_p_val < 0.01 & MastResult$MeanLog < -1, "Downregulated", "Not Significant")))

#List of genes with adjusted p-value < 0.01 and log2-fold change > 2
MastUp <- MastDF %>% filter(AdjPValue < 0.01 & Log2FC > 1) %>% pull(Gene)
#List of genes with adjusted p-value < 0.01 and log2-fold change < -2
MastDown <- MastDF %>% filter(AdjPValue < 0.01 & Log2FC < -1) %>% pull(Gene)

#Volcano plot for MAST results, lines for significance borders and label and colors for significant genes
ggplot(MastDF, aes(x = Log2FC, y = -log10(AdjPValue), color = Significant)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.01), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_text_repel(data = MastDF %>% filter(Significant != "Not Significant"), aes(label = Gene), size = 3)
```

```{r Volcplot EdgeR}
#Dataframe with gene name, log2-fold change and adjusted p-value for EdgeR results, with significance if in EdgeRUp or EdgeRDown
EdgeRDF <- data.frame(Gene = EdgeRResult$Gene, Log2FC = EdgeRResult$avg_log2FC, AdjPValue = EdgeRResult$p_val, Significant = ifelse(EdgeRResult$p_val < 0.01 & EdgeRResult$avg_log2FC > 1, "Upregulated", ifelse(EdgeRResult$p_val < 0.01 & EdgeRResult$avg_log2FC < -1, "Downregulated", "Not Significant")))

#List of upregulated genes in EdgeRobject
EdgeRUp <- EdgeRDF %>% filter(AdjPValue < 0.01 & Log2FC > 1) %>% pull(Gene)
#List of downregulated genes in EdgeR object
EdgeRDown <- EdgeRDF %>% filter(AdjPValue < 0.01 & Log2FC < -1) %>% pull(Gene)

#Volcano plot for EdgeR results, lines for significance borders and label and colors for significant genes
ggplot(EdgeRDF, aes(x = Log2FC, y = -log10(AdjPValue), color = Significant)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.01), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_text_repel(data = EdgeRDF %>% filter(Significant != "Not Significant"), aes(label = Gene), size = 3)

```

```{r Comparing MAST and EdgeR log2-fold change}

```

```{r Comparing MAST and EdgeR p-value}

```

```{r Size of groups}
#Adding grouped metadata for easier plotting
IntegratedObject$Cell_Line_n_Tissue <- paste(IntegratedObject$Cell_Line_n, IntegratedObject$Tissue, sep = "_")
IntegratedObject$Mouse_n_Tissue <- paste(IntegratedObject$Mouse_n, IntegratedObject$Tissue, sep = "_")

#Checking group sizes
table(IntegratedObject$Tissue)
table(IntegratedObject$Cell_Line_n_Tissue)
table(IntegratedObject$Mouse_n_Tissue)
```

```{r Visualizing the integration}
#Runing UMAP on integrated data
IntegratedObject <- RunUMAP(IntegratedObject, reduction.name = "umap.harmony", reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE, seed.use = 1999)
IntegratedObject <- RunUMAP(IntegratedObject, reduction.name = "umap.cca", reduction = "integrated.cca", dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE, seed.use = 1999)


wrap_plots(
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.cca", group.by = "Cell_Line_n", cols = PDX_colours) + ggtitle("CCA Integrated Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Cell_Line_n", cols = PDX_colours) + ggtitle("Harmony Integrated Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.merged", group.by = "Cell_Line_n") + ggtitle("non-integrated Merged Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.cca", group.by = "Tissue", cols = Tissue_colours) + ggtitle("CCA Integrated Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", cols = Tissue_colours) + ggtitle("Harmony Integrated Object"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.merged", group.by = "Tissue", cols = Tissue_colours) + ggtitle("non-integrated Merged Object"),
  ncol = 3
)
```

```{r Visualizing Object}
DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", split.by = "Mouse_n", ncol = 3, cols = Tissue_colours)
DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", split.by = "Cell_Line_n", ncol = 3, cols = Tissue_colours)
DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Mouse_n", split.by = "Cell_Line_n", ncol = 3)

#Use same colors for PDX as Gustav
Figure1 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Cell_Line_n", cols = PDX_colours) + ggtitle("Grouped by Cell Line") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "sans", color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")
Figure1

saveRDS(Figure1, "Figure1.rds")

#Factoring Levels
IntegratedObject$Cell_Line_n_Tissue <- factor(IntegratedObject$Cell_Line_n_Tissue, levels = c("PDX1_PT", "PDX2_PT", "PDX3_PT", "PDX1_BM", "PDX2_BM", "PDX3_BM"))

#Add colors, PDX specific for title and dots for Site
DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", split.by = "Cell_Line_n_Tissue", ncol = 3, cols = Tissue_colours) + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "sans", color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(colour = rep(PDX_colours, 2))) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")


PT1plot <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, cells = WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX1_PT"), reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", cols = Tissue_colours) + ggtitle("PT LU-NB-1") + NoLegend() + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(colour = PDX_colours[1])) + ylab("UMAP 2")
PT2plot <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, cells = WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX2_PT"), reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", cols = Tissue_colours) + ggtitle("PT LU-NB-2") + NoLegend() + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(colour = PDX_colours[2]))
PT3plot <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, cells = WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX3_PT"), reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", cols = Tissue_colours) + ggtitle("PT LU-NB-3") + NoLegend() + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(colour = PDX_colours[3]))
BM1plot <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, cells = WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX1_BM"), reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", cols = Tissue_colours) + ggtitle("BM LU-NB-1") + NoLegend() + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "sans", color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(colour = PDX_colours[1])) + ylab("UMAP 2") + xlab("UMAP 1")
BM2plot <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, cells = WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX2_BM"), reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", cols = Tissue_colours) + ggtitle("BM LU-NB-2") + NoLegend() + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(colour = PDX_colours[2])) + xlab("UMAP 1")
BM3plot <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, cells = WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX3_BM"), reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Tissue", cols = Tissue_colours) + ggtitle("BM LU-NB-3") + NoLegend() + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(colour = PDX_colours[3])) + xlab("UMAP 1")
Figure2 <- wrap_plots(PT1plot, PT2plot, PT3plot, BM1plot, BM2plot, BM3plot, ncol = 3) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")
Figure2
```

###Finding Clusters
```{r Clustering With different resolutions}
#Clustering with res 0.9
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.9)
ClustRes09 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.9")

#0.8
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.8)
ClustRes08 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.8")

#0.7
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.7)
ClustRes07 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.7")

#0.6
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.6)
ClustRes06 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.6")

#0.5
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.5)
ClustRes05 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.5")

#0.4
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.4)
ClustRes04 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.4")

#0.3
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.3)
ClustRes03 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.3")

#0.2
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.2)
ClustRes02 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.2")

#0.1
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.1)
ClustRes01 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.1")

#Visualizing clusters with different resolutions
wrap_plots(
  ClustRes09, ClustRes08, ClustRes07, ClustRes06, ClustRes05, ClustRes04, ClustRes03, ClustRes02, ClustRes01,
  ncol = 3
)
```

```{r Finding clusters with smaller resolutions}
#Finding clusters with smaller resolutions
#0.2
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.2)
ClustRes20 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.2")

#0.18
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.18)
ClustRes18 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.18")

#0.16
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.16)
ClustRes16 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.16")

#0.14
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.14)
ClustRes14 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.14")

#0.12
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.12)
ClustRes12 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.12")

#0.10
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.10)
ClustRes10 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.10")

#0.08
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.08)
ClustRes08 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.08")

#0.06
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.06)
ClustRes06 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.06")

#0.04
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.04)
ClustRes04 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Resolution 0.04")

#Visualizing clusters with different resolutions
wrap_plots(
  ClustRes20, ClustRes18, ClustRes16, ClustRes14, ClustRes12, ClustRes10, ClustRes08, ClustRes06, ClustRes04,
  ncol = 3
)

```
```{r Nbr of clusters at different resolutions}
#Tar tid och redan kört, behöver ej köras om
#resList <- list()
##loop from 0.01 to 1.0 with 0.01 increments
#for (res in seq(0.01, 1.0, by = 0.01)) {
#  #Find neighbors and clusters
#  IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
#  IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = res)
#  
#  #Count number of clusters
#  clustnbr <- length(unique(IntegratedObject$seurat_clusters))
#  
#  #Add number of clusters to list
#  resList[[as.character(res)]] <- clustnbr
#}

saveRDS(resList, "Number of clusters at different resolutions.rds")
resList <- readRDS("Number of clusters at different resolutions.rds")

#Ggplot of changes in cluster number with different resolutions
resDF <- data.frame(Resolution = as.numeric(names(resList)), ClusterNumber = unlist(resList))
ggplot(resDF, aes(x = Resolution, y = ClusterNumber)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  ggtitle("Number of Clusters at Different Resolutions") +
  xlab("Resolution") +
  ylab("Number of Clusters") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r Setting resolution, watching results}
#13 cluster at res 0.15 seem to be a good choice
IntegratedObject <- FindNeighbors(IntegratedObject, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
IntegratedObject <- FindClusters(IntegratedObject, resolution = 0.15)

#Setting cluster names 1-13
new.cluster.ids <- c(1:13) 
names(new.cluster.ids) <- levels(IntegratedObject)
IntegratedObject <- RenameIdents(IntegratedObject, new.cluster.ids)
IntegratedObject$seurat_clusters <- Idents(IntegratedObject)

Figure3 <- DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters", cols = Cluster_colours) + ggtitle("Resolution 0.15") + ggtitle("Clustered") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "sans", color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")
Figure3
DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Cell_Line_n", split.by = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, cols = PDX_colours) + ggtitle("Resolution 0.15")
```


###Investigate clusters
```{r Composition of clusters}
#Creating a dataframe with clusters, and percentage of each cell line. First creating a vector of cluster, then a vector of PDXlines, then a vector of percentages
clusterVec <- rep(0:12, times = 3)
PDXvec <- rep(c("PDX1", "PDX2", "PDX3"), each = 13)
PDX1Vec <- c(length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12)) * 100)
PDX2Vec <- c(length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12)) * 100)
PDX3Vec <- c(length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11)) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12)) * 100)

clusterDF <- data.frame(Cluster = clusterVec, PDX = PDXvec, Percentage = c(PDX1Vec, PDX2Vec, PDX3Vec))

ggplot(clusterDF, aes(x = factor(Cluster), y = Percentage, fill = PDX)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("PDX1" = "red", "PDX2" = "blue", "PDX3" = "green")) +
  ggtitle("Percentage of Each PDX in Each Cluster") +
  xlab("Cluster") +
  ylab("Percentage of Cells") +
  theme_minimal()

#Creating a dataframe with clusters, and percentage of each tissue. First creating a vector of clusters, then a vector of tissues, then a vector of percentages
clusterVec2 <- rep(0:12, times = 2)
TissueVec <- rep(c("BM", "PT"), each = 13)
BMVec <- c(length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12, expression = Tissue == "BM")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12)) * 100)
PTVec <- c(length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11)) * 100,
           length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12, expression = Tissue == "PT")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12)) * 100)
clusterDF2 <- data.frame(Cluster = clusterVec2, Tissue = TissueVec, Percentage = c(BMVec, PTVec))
ggplot(clusterDF2, aes(x = factor(Cluster), y = Percentage, fill = Tissue)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BM" = "purple", "PT" = "cyan")) +
  ggtitle("Percentage of Each Tissue in Each Cluster") +
  xlab("Cluster") +
  ylab("Percentage of Cells") +
  theme_minimal()

#Creating a dataframe with PDX, and percentage of each cluster. First creating a vector of PDXlines, then a vector of clusters, then a vector of percentages
PDXvec2 <- rep(c("PDX1", "PDX2", "PDX3"), each = 13)
clusterVec3 <- rep(0:12, times = 3)
PDX1Vec <- c(length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX1")) * 100)
PDX2Vec <- c(length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX2")) * 100)
PDX3Vec <- c(length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 0, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 1, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 2, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 3, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 4, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 5, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 6, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 7, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 8, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 9, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 10, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 11, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100,
             length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = 12, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) / length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n == "PDX3")) * 100)

clusterDF3 <- data.frame(PDX = PDXvec2, Cluster = clusterVec3, Percentage = c(PDX1Vec, PDX2Vec, PDX3Vec))
#Percentage Barplot with each clusters percentage in each PDX line is stacked to 100%
ggplot(clusterDF3, aes(x = PDX, fill = factor(Cluster), y = Percentage)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  ggtitle("Percentage of Each Cluster in Each PDX") +
  xlab("PDX") +
  ylab("Percentage of Cells") +
  theme_minimal()

#Dataframe of each Cell_Line_n_Tissue composition of clusters by creating 3 vectors and combining
PDXandSite <- rep(c("PDX1_PT", "PDX1_BM", "PDX2_PT", "PDX2_BM", "PDX3_PT", "PDX3_BM"), each = 13)
Clusters <- rep(c(1:13), times = 6)
PT1comp <- c()
for (cluster in 1:13) {
  comp = 100*length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, idents = cluster, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX1_PT"))/length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX1_PT"))
  PT1comp <- c(PT1comp, comp)
}
PT2comp <- c()
for (cluster in 1:13) {
  comp = 100*length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, idents = cluster, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX2_PT"))/length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX2_PT"))
  PT2comp <- c(PT2comp, comp)
}
PT3comp <- c()
for (cluster in 1:13) {
  comp = 100*length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, idents = cluster, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX3_PT"))/length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX3_PT"))
  PT3comp <- c(PT3comp, comp)
}
BM1comp <- c()
for (cluster in 1:13) {
  comp = 100*length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, idents = cluster, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX1_BM"))/length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX1_BM"))
  BM1comp <- c(BM1comp, comp)
}
BM2comp <- c()
for (cluster in 1:13) {
  comp = 100*length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, idents = cluster, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX2_BM"))/length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX2_BM"))
  BM2comp <- c(BM2comp, comp)
}
BM3comp <- c()
for (cluster in 1:13) {
  comp = 100*length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, idents = cluster, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX3_BM"))/length(WhichCells(IntegratedObject, expression = Cell_Line_n_Tissue == "PDX3_BM"))
  BM3comp <- c(BM3comp, comp)
}
CellLineTissueCompDF <- data.frame(PDX_Site <- PDXandSite, Cluster = Clusters, Percentage = c(PT1comp, BM1comp, PT2comp, BM2comp, PT3comp, BM3comp))
CellLineTissueCompDF$Cluster <- factor(CellLineTissueCompDF$Cluster, levels = 1:13)
CellLineTissueCompDF$PDX_Site <- factor(CellLineTissueCompDF$PDX_Site, levels = c("PDX1_PT", "PDX1_BM", "PDX2_PT", "PDX2_BM", "PDX3_PT", "PDX3_BM"))

#Barplot
ggplot(CellLineTissueCompDF, aes(fill=Cluster, y=Percentage, x=PDX_Site, size=8)) + 
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity", width = 0.9) + 
  ggtitle("Percentage of Clusters per PDX and Location") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = Cluster_colours) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent(), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("PDX1_PT", "PDX1_BM", "", "PDX2_PT", "PDX2_BM", "", "PDX3_PT", "PDX3_BM"), labels = c("PT LU-NB-1", "BM LU-NB-1", "", "PT LU-NB-2", "BM LU-NB-2", "", "PT LU-NB-3", "BM LU-NB-3")) +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Percentage > 3, round(Percentage, 2), "")), 
            position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5), color =  "black", size = 4) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
  legend.position = "right",
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
  axis.title.y = element_blank(),
  axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.5, lineend = "square"),
  axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.5),
  axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
  axis.line.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15, colour = c(PDX_colours[1], PDX_colours[1], PDX_colours[2], PDX_colours[2], PDX_colours[2], PDX_colours[3], PDX_colours[3])),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  text = element_text(family = "sans", size = 12, color = "black")
)

```
```{r Finding cluster markers}
#Finding markers on log-normalized data
clusterMarkers <- FindAllMarkers(IntegratedObject, group.by = "seurat_clusters", only.pos = FALSE, assay = "SCT", slot = "data" , min.pct = 0.1, logfc.threshold = 0.25)

#Top 10 and top 5 per cluster
clusterMarkers %>% 
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  ungroup() -> top10Cluster
clusterMarkers %>% 
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  ungroup() -> top5Cluster
```

```{r Heatmap of top 10 genes per cluster}

```

```{r Dotplot of top 10 genes per cluster}

```

###Checking Mesenchymal and Adrenergic markers
```{r}
ADRNgenes <- c("TH", "DBH", "CHGA", "PHOX2B", "GATA3", "MYCN", "PHOX2A")
MESgenes <- c("CD44", "FN1", "COL1A1", "RUNX2", "WWTR1", "IRF1", "SNAI2", "VIM")

#Feature plots for ADRN and MES markers
FeaturePlot(IntegratedObject, features = ADRNgenes, reduction = "umap.harmony", ncol = 4)
FeaturePlot(IntegratedObject, features = MESgenes, reduction = "umap.harmony", ncol = 4)

#VlnPlot for ADRN and MES markers per cluster
VlnPlot(IntegratedObject, features = ADRNgenes, group.by = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 4, assay="RNA", layer="data") + ggtitle("ADRN Markers")
VlnPlot(IntegratedObject, features = MESgenes, group.by = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 4, assay="RNA", layer="data") + ggtitle("MES Markers")

#AddModuleScore fro ADRN and MES
IntegratedObject <- AddModuleScore(IntegratedObject, features = list(ADRNgenes), name = "ADRN_Score", assay="RNA", layer="data")
IntegratedObject <- AddModuleScore(IntegratedObject, features = list(MESgenes), name = "MES_Score", assay="RNA", layer="data")

#VlnPlot for ADRN and MES score per cluster
VlnPlot(IntegratedObject, features = c("ADRN_Score1"), group.by = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 1) + ggtitle("ADRN Score")
VlnPlot(IntegratedObject, features = c("MES_Score1"), group.by = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 1) + ggtitle("MES Score")

FeaturePlot(IntegratedObject, features = c("ADRN_Score1", "MES_Score1"), reduction = "umap.harmony", min.cutoff = "q10", max.cutoff = "q90", blend = TRUE, cols = c("lightgrey", "orange", "navy"), combine = FALSE) + ggtitle("ADRN and MES Scores")

FeatureScatter(IntegratedObject, feature1 = "ADRN_Score1", feature2 = "MES_Score1", split.by = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 7) + ggtitle("ADRN vs MES Score")

#Calculate average score per cluster, ADRN score and MES scores are stored as metadata for each cell
ADRNscores  <- aggregate(IntegratedObject$ADRN_Score1, by = list(Cluster = IntegratedObject$seurat_clusters), FUN = mean)
MESscores  <- aggregate(IntegratedObject$MES_Score1, by = list(Cluster = IntegratedObject$seurat_clusters), FUN = mean)

#Barplot of average ADRN and MES score per cluster. 2 Bars per cluster, one ADRN and one MES, with different colors
scoreDF <- data.frame(Cluster = rep(ADRNscores$Cluster, 2), Score = c(ADRNscores$x, MESscores$x), Type = rep(c("ADRN", "MES"), each = nrow(ADRNscores)))
ggplot(scoreDF, aes(x = factor(Cluster), y = Score, fill = Type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ADRN" = "orange", "MES" = "navy")) +
  ggtitle("Average ADRN and MES Score per Cluster") +
  xlab("Cluster") +
  ylab("Average Score") +
  theme_minimal()

#Percentage of cells with higher ADRN than MES score, or higher MES score than ADRN score, per cluster.
scoreDF2 <- data.frame(Cluster = unique(IntegratedObject$seurat_clusters), ADRN_Higher = NA, MES_Higher = NA)
for (clust in scoreDF2$Cluster) {
  cells_in_cluster <- WhichCells(IntegratedObject, ident = clust)
  ADRN_higher <- sum(IntegratedObject$ADRN_Score1[cells_in_cluster] > IntegratedObject$MES_Score1[cells_in_cluster])
  MES_higher <- sum(IntegratedObject$MES_Score1[cells_in_cluster] > IntegratedObject$ADRN_Score1[cells_in_cluster])
  total_cells <- length(cells_in_cluster)
  scoreDF2$ADRN_Higher[scoreDF2$Cluster == clust] <- ADRN_higher / total_cells * 100
  scoreDF2$MES_Higher[scoreDF2$Cluster == clust] <- MES_higher / total_cells * 100
}
scoreDF2_long <- scoreDF2 %>% pivot_longer(cols = c("ADRN_Higher", "MES_Higher"), names_to = "Type", values_to = "Percentage")
ggplot(scoreDF2_long, aes(x = factor(Cluster), y = Percentage, fill = Type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ADRN_Higher" = "orange", "MES_Higher" = "navy"), labels = c("ADRN Higher", "MES Higher")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed") +
  ggtitle("Percentage of Cells with Higher ADRN or MES Score per Cluster") +
  xlab("Cluster") +
  ylab("Percentage of Cells") +
  theme_minimal()

length(rownames(IntegratedObject[["SCT"]]))
length(rownames(IntegratedObject[["SCT"]]@data)) # Normalized data, 21790 genes
length(rownames(IntegratedObject[["SCT"]]@scale.data)) # Scaled, 782 genes. 

```

```{r Trying SCTransform with more Varible Features}
IntObj2k <- IntegratedObject
DefaultAssay(IntObj2k) <- "RNA"
IntObj2k[["SCT"]] <- NULL

#SCTransform, same as Gustav + variable.features.n = 2000
IntObj2k <- SCTransform(IntObj2k,vars.to.regress = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent_mito", "cc_difference", "percent_ribo"), return.only.var.genes = FALSE, verbose = TRUE, variable.features.n = 2000)
# Set Default Assay
DefaultAssay(IntObj2k) <- "SCT"

#Checking number of genes in the scaled data of the SCT assay
length(rownames(IntObj2k[["SCT"]])) # 21790 genes
length(rownames(IntObj2k[["SCT"]]@data)) # Normalized
length(rownames(IntObj2k[["SCT"]]@scale.data)) # Scaled
```

```{r Doing the rest of the integration and UMAP pipeline}
# Run PCA
IntObj2k <- RunPCA(IntObj2k, seed.use = 1999,verbose = FALSE)

#UMAP unintegrated
IntObj2k <- RunUMAP(IntObj2k, reduction.name = "umap.preintegration", reduction = "pca", dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE, seed.use = 1999)

# Run one-line integration
IntObj2k <- IntegrateLayers(
    object = IntObj2k, method = HarmonyIntegration,
    orig.reduction = "pca", dims = 1:30,
    new.reduction = "integrated.harmony",
    normalization.method = "SCT", k.weight = 57,
    verbose = FALSE
  )

#UMAP unintegrated
IntObj2k <- RunUMAP(IntObj2k, reduction.name = "umap.harmony", reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE, seed.use = 1999)

wrap_plots(
  DimPlot(IntObj2k, reduction = "umap.preintegration", group.by = "Cell_Line_n") + ggtitle("Pre-integration UMAP with more genes"),
  DimPlot(IntObj2k, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Cell_Line_n") + ggtitle("Harmony Integrated UMAP"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.merged", group.by = "Cell_Line_n") + ggtitle("non-integrated Merged UMAP"),
  DimPlot(IntegratedObject, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Cell_Line_n") + ggtitle("Harmony Integrated UMAP"),
  ncol = 2
)

saveRDS(IntObj2k, "IntObj with var.genes.n set to 2k.rds")
```


###Checking BM markers in PT
```{r}

```
